system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["572c42ae-426e-4373-9f86-cc84711b1137", "5f0d60b5-2772-4615-9d32-586f1992e02a", "5487b7bf-56ee-4d04-80e6-865330d8ec6e"], "article_ids": ["73898577-c2f5-4320-a824-2f4e5bfcf228", "25877eb8-1478-4620-8572-9e586f516986", "afcef673-94cf-47a1-8b92-723d72886717"], "editorial_angle": "观察功能性与时尚性的融合趋势，分析实用主义单品如何通过设计创新重回潮流中心", "title_zh": "鞋履革新与丹宁回潮：本季实用主义时尚", "dek_zh": "Timberland推出可转换木底鞋挑战传统工装美学，Madewell桶型牛仔裤与编织手袋持续热销，McQueen秋冬大片演绎伦敦东区叛逆精神", "source_names": ["GQ China", "Highsnobiety", "Refinery29"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "73898577-c2f5-4320-a824-2f4e5bfcf228", "source_name": "Highsnobiety", "title_raw": "Timberland Really Turned Its Boots Into "Crocs" Clogs", "summary_raw": "If a Timberland Boot crossed with a Crocs Clog and a Blundstone chef shoe, it'd probably look a lot like the bizarre new Timberland Convertible Clog.", "body_markdown": "# Timberland Really Turned Its Boots Into "Crocs" Clogs

If a Timberland Boot crossed with a Crocs Clog and a Blundstone chef shoe, it'd probably look a lot like the bizarre new Timberland Convertible Clog.

TikTokers aren’t the only ones chopping the tops of Timberland boots anymore. When Telfar created Slip-On Timbs Loafers last year, the viral DIY trend became a reality. Now, Timberland is taking it on itself.

The Timberland Premium Convertible Clog also removes the heel of Timberland's signature work boot, creating a more overt pair of slip-on Timbs.

The bottom half of the Convertible Clog is identical to any pair of wheat Timbs, consisting of a nubuck upper, chunky injection-moulded rubber sole and the classic clean rounded toebox. But these clogs are missing a whole lot of boot.

Where there is normally quadruple-stitched heel reinforcement and a tall shaft, the Convertible Clog wears nothing but a matching strap akin to a pair of Crocs Classic Clogs, although the shoe’s shape is more consistent with a Blundstone chef clog.

Not that anyone would confuse them, as the Convertible Clog is unmistakably Timberland.

When shoemaker Nathan Swartz produced the first Timberland 8-Inch work boot in 1973, he had no way of knowing that it’d become the cultural signifier it is today. And he definitely wouldn’t have expected his robust blue-collar boot to ever become a slipper. Clogs on a construction site? No chance.

But Timberland’s Premium Convertible Clog, available now for $130, is part of a booming niche of slip-on shoes that were never meant to drop their heels, including everything from hiking boots to Nike Air Maxes to Vans skate shoes. In the era of mule-ificiation, no shoes are safe.

Highsnobiety has affiliate marketing partnerships, which means we may receive a commission from your purchase. Want to shop the products our editors actually love? Visit HS Shopping for recs on all things fashion, footwear, and beauty.
"}, {"article_id": "25877eb8-1478-4620-8572-9e586f516986", "source_name": "Refinery29", "title_raw": "Last Chance! The Madewell Insider Sale Ends This Weekend", "summary_raw": "The shopping event of the year is here. Find out how you can save 25% off nearly everything during the latest Madewell sale. Shop discounts on new arrivals, bestsellers, and trending Madewell styles like barrel jeans and woven handbags through March 22.", "body_markdown": "# Last Chance! The Madewell Insider Sale Ends This Weekend

The shopping event of the year is here. Find out how you can save 25% off nearly everything during the latest Madewell sale. Shop discounts on new arrivals, bestsellers, and trending Madewell styles like barrel jeans and woven handbags through March 22.

Now that 7 p.m. sunsets are here and the days are getting warmer, we’re eager to clean out our closets and refresh them with new spring outfits. But we’re also not looking to break the bank. The solution? Madewell’s Insiders Event!

The editor- and reader-favorite brand kicked off its bi-annual mega sale to all Madewell Insiders this week, and you’ve got a couple more days to cash in on the deals. Nearly everything is 25% off with an extra 40% off sale styles (automatically applied at checkout when signed in), both online and in stores. It even includes new arrivals and bestsellers!

From spring must-haves like trending barrel-leg jeans and woven handbags, you can cart up staples and put together head-to-toe outfits — especially while styles are discounted throughout the weekend until March 23 at 2:59 a.m. EST.

All linked products are independently selected by our editors. If you purchase any of these products, we may earn a commission.

ADVERTISEMENT
"}, {"article_id": "afcef673-94cf-47a1-8b92-723d72886717", "source_name": "GQ China", "title_raw": "McQueen 2024秋冬系列形象广告大片", "summary_raw": "以伦敦东区为故事背景，形象广告大片捕捉了城市青年叛逆不羁的魅力——在钢筋水泥和广阔街道之间，形色穿梭，追寻原始欢愉。", "body_markdown": "# McQueen 2024秋冬系列形象广告大片

以伦敦东区为故事背景，形象广告大片捕捉了城市青年叛逆不羁的魅力——在钢筋水泥和广阔街道之间，形色穿梭，追寻原始欢愉。

以伦敦东区为故事背景，形象广告大片捕捉了城市青年叛逆不羁的魅力——在钢筋水泥和广阔街道之间，形色穿梭，追寻原始欢愉。

他们的着装极具触感，以扭曲与紧绷风格自我表达。

簇绒牛仔布的接缝和利落胸线上镶嵌着碎黑玉石的西装，迸发出满满的动物本能。

浓郁的牛血色皮革Sling斜挎包紧紧地裹住身躯，与超硬合金T 形扣的闪光形成鲜明对比。同样的搭扣也系起了乐福鞋面上拖曳的流苏。

或束缚，或茧裹，他们的共通性都是为本能而生—为了获得巨大的感官之快，紧裹着剪羊毛在现代生活的坚硬片段中横冲直撞。

致伦敦的变幻莫测。

关于SEÁN MCGIRR：

Seán McGirr为亚历山大麦昆品牌创意总监。他于1988年出生于爱尔兰都柏林，2014年于伦敦中央圣马丁学院取得服装艺术硕士学位。Seán McGirr此前曾担任JW Anderson品牌成衣部总监，也曾在Dries Van Noten、Uniqlo及Burberry任职。

关于MCQUEEN：

Alexander McQueen是英国奢侈品时装品牌，由Lee Alexander McQueen于1992年创立。2001年，成为全球高端精品集团开云旗下品牌。2023年12月起，品牌在创意总监Seán McGirr的指导下持续拓展其影响力。

Alexander McQueen以强调个体影响力、颠覆性力量和原始力量感的独特表达而著称。品牌设计工作室和工坊位于伦敦，不妥协的极致品质和创意视野是其最具代表性的品牌特质。

LOOKS:

1. 黑色羊毛马海毛黑玉碎片刺绣装饰精裁外套及长裤，原色翻羊毛、白色棉罗纹针织背心。

2. 黑色皮革钉饰飞行夹克，接缝处蜜糖色翻羊毛装饰靛蓝色石洗牛仔裤，搭配Birdee黑色皮革布洛克鞋。

3. 石灰色棉帆布皮领外套，饰有鸟尾形后背细节，黑色羊毛格子迷你半裙，搭配Fringe黑色皮革乐福鞋及Cross-Bar黑色皮革手袋。

4. 吊灯碎片、红色、橘色自行车反射灯刺绣装饰连衣裙，以薄纱为底衬，搭配Hoof黑色皮革短靴及Drop银色金属手袋。

5. 原色翻羊毛夸张衬垫领口大衣，搭配Hoof棕色翻皮毛短靴。

6. 黑色羊毛马海毛全身碎玉刺绣装饰精裁外套及长裤。

7. 白色羊毛粒纹面料精裁外套和长裤，后背饰有T型扣链，象牙白色丝绸罗纹针织面料T恤，搭配黑色皮革费多拉帽，其上饰有弧形logo滑扣。

8. 黑色扭曲层积针织面料垂褶裙，搭配Birdee黑色亮面材质短靴。

9. 黑色皮革钉饰背心，蓝色石洗捆绑细节牛仔裤。

10. 黑色尼龙网眼、镭射切割碎屏效果刺绣错视效果T恤，黑色弹力皮革长裤，搭配Sling黑色皮革手袋。

CREDITS:

创意总监: Seán McGirr

艺术总监: Christopher Simmonds

摄影: Glen Luchford

造型: Marie Chaix

化妆: Daniel Sallstrom

发型: Gary Gill

美甲: Ama Quashie

制作: MAI Production

模特: Awwal Adeoti, Libby Bennett, Sara Caballero, Nyajouk Gatdet, Reuben Larkin, Long Li, Bebe Parnell, Aryan Patel, Owen Ruppersburg, Canlan Wang
"}]}
